name: Phase 3 Consumer - Cleanup Processes
description: Stop all vLLM processes and clean GPU memory

tasks.name: Stop All vLLM Processes
tasks.description: Stop all running vLLM and python processes

tasks.name: Clean GPU Memory
tasks.description: Force kill any remaining GPU processes
commands: nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits | awk '{print "[INFO] GPU memory used: "$1" MB"}'

tasks.name: Verify Cleanup
commands: pgrep -u ubuntu python && echo '[WARNING] Python processes still running' || echo '[OK] All ubuntu python processes stopped'
